mapper.sql: id, name, website, industry, phone, address, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM company ORDER BY name
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.website, c.industry, c.phone, c.address, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM company c JOIN company_tag ct ON ct.company_id = c.id WHERE ct.tag_id = #{tagId} ORDER BY c.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company (name, website, industry, phone, address) VALUES (#{name}, #{website}, #{industry}, #{phone}, #{address})
mapper.update: UPDATE company SET name = #{name}, website = #{website}, industry = #{industry}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO company_tag (company_id, tag_id) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{tagId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM company_tag WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
